info.title: Plinth.Scaffold
info.description: .NET tool for generating database and API boilerplate CRUD code

options.name: --output
options.description:
(Default: .\Output) change where output files are
written

options.name: --disable-database
options.description:
(Default: false) disable generation of database
entities

options.name: --disable-common
options.description:
(Default: false) disable generation of common
entities

options.name: --disable-dataaccess
options.description:
(Default: false) disable generation of data access
entities

options.name: --disable-logic
options.description:
(Default: false) disable generation of business logic
entities

options.name: --disable-webapi
options.description:
(Default: false) disable generation of web api
entities

options.name: --webapi-client
options.description: (Default: false) generate C# client for web api

options.name: --mobile-android
options.description:
(Default: false) generate clients for Android mobile
platform (Java)

options.name: --mobile-ios
options.description:
(Default: false) generate clients for iOS mobile
platform (Swift)

options.name: --schema
options.description:
(Default: false) generate json schema for scaffold
input file

options.name: --ignore-cycle-errors
options.description:
(Default: false) do not throw an error is a cycle is
detected in foreign key definitions
